# Daily Report — 2026-04-30

## Task Completed
Implemented `delete_asset` tool — permanently removes an asset record from the `alm_asset`
table via `DELETE /api/now/table/alm_asset/{sys_id}`. Handles 204 No Content, 404 Not Found,
and network error paths. Registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, and both the
`system_administrator` and `full` packages in `tool_packages.yaml`. Added 10 new tests
covering all code paths.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 827 passed, 4 deselected
- Coverage: 90% overall; asset_tools.py at 99%
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level tool vulnerabilities (pip, setuptools, wheel, pyjwt) — none in project dependencies.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/asset_tools.py` — added `DeleteAssetParams` and `delete_asset()`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — exported `delete_asset`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported and registered `delete_asset` tool definition
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added `delete_asset` to `system_administrator` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_asset_tools.py` — added `TestDeleteAsset` with 10 tests
